name: formal-gates
description: AI code quality gate skill for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. Hook enforcement must be verified per host with a live canary.

hosts.name: Claude Code
hosts.caveat: Install the full package as a Claude skill; command hook support requires configured settings and a live canary on Claude Code.

hosts.name: Codex
hosts.caveat: Install the full package as a Codex skill; hook enforcement requires Codex hook/config setup and a live canary on Codex. This package does not claim Codex plugin distribution.

hosts.name: Cursor
hosts.caveat: Install Cursor hook support through hooks.json; hook enforcement requires a live canary on Cursor.

examples.purpose: Sample prompts for human or Darwin-style skill review.

external_validators.name: skill-creator quick validator
external_validators.requires: An external skill-creator checkout or installed validator path. Replace <skill-creator> before running.

validation_notes: verification_commands contains only repo-local commands runnable from this package root.
external_validators lists optional validators outside this package and must not be treated as directly executable repo-local commands.
support_caveats: Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor are separate host targets.
Hook enforcement claims require live canary evidence on the specific host.
A passing canary on one host does not prove another host. Do not claim Codex plugin distribution from this package.
